items.title: [负面] F2P и упрощённый Darkest Dungeon с азиатским виден...
items.summary:
F2P и упрощённый Darkest Dungeon с азиатским виденьем. Зачем это выпускать в Steam, если не в силах сделать даже английский текст без ИИ? Зачем играть в это, если можно сыграть в серию Darkest Dungeon? 

Ах, да. Забыл упомянуть, есть существует такая игра как Darkest Dungeon. Хы-хы.

10 страж \ 10 страж
[hr][/hr]
Целевая аудитория игры - мобильные игроки. Насколько целесообразно публиковать ф2п мобильный клон DD в стиме без пучка локализаций? Не знаю.
[spoiler][i]Кто-то эту [strike]игру[/strike] продукт полюбит, но явно не я.[/i] На меня будто выплюнули пережёванный Darkest Dungeon с примесью анимешной версии Bloodborne. Оставил бы позитивную оценку, но не люблю играть в эмульсии других игр.[/spoiler]

items.title: [正面] Знаете, в отличии от других гача-игр в эту можно з...
items.summary: Знаете, в отличии от других гача-игр в эту можно залипнуть. Она в целом неплохая, но рекомендую всё таки играть на английском (перевод очень плох и меняется от обновы к обнове). Кому нравится карточный геймплей и гача элементы пойдёт, остальным не очень.
items.review: Знаете, в отличии от других гача-игр в эту можно залипнуть. Она в целом неплохая, но рекомендую всё таки играть на английском (перевод очень плох и меняется от обновы к обнове). Кому нравится карточный геймплей и гача элементы пойдёт, остальным не очень.

items.title:
[正面] At first I was skeptical about this game.
I entere...
items.summary:
At first I was skeptical about this game.
I entered with expectation it was another cashgrab gacha game.

I was wrong, the game was much better than what I initially expect. Although the bad side of gacha exist (like Fomo schemes, 2 types monthly subscription, etc), it is not something that the game really focus on.
Most of the gaming experience can be enjoyed even without being dolphin or whales, the fomo on characters is not as bad as in other gacha game.

Combat Gameplay & Team building:
The meat of the game, you can spend lots of time just thinking of the team setups.
Game is not exactly easy and each turn you keep thinking how to do the best with what you have. 
The shiny new units are definitely strong, but it's not exactly straightforward, and even with shiny newer units bad team setups won't win you the game.

Ironically, there are not many team building guides (although, their Discord is cooperative when asked for help), and this is surprisingly beneficial for the game. As players like me will often decide to go blind when tackling the stages instead of looking at guides, and crafting our own team, which is fun.

Story:
It is good, and definitely not whatever-written.
While it is not an award winning story, it is definitely an enjoyment to read (Many other gacha games, even the mainstream one, I just skip their awful story).

Daily routine load:
If you're on the phase of just playing for the daily reward.
It is very Light (about 5~10 min), if you don't want to play daily, it is fine skipping some of the daily rewards.
The weekly is more important. However, daily gives you currency that unlocks side stories or past events, so newer players might want many of those from dailies.

Others:
There are many of the dev touch that made me appreciate the game, underappreciated little stuff that people easily missed, things that even if the devs did not do it it will still be ok, yet they still do it.
These are usually the case if the some members of the devs are passionate of their own game, something that devs that only interested in $ will never do.

Weakness:
The 16 dupes is actually glaring issue for those that don't know much about this game.

Text describing skills and effects could be better, more concise and readable.

Sometimes, the power level goes far out of control, not in a good way, because most of it come from unnecessary complexities from certain character kits. So the teambuilding ceiling is (uncontrolled) awfully high, the difference between the bottom and top team is simply insane.

If you are completely F2P, the stamina may feel very strict and stingy, especially at beginning. Since the need to build 5 complete team (20 character) will be exhausting lots of resources.
